rationale: The frozen production candidate exists in PR 15, matches PREM-LPP-006 version 0.1.0 at standard risk, is an ancestor of the required governance head, and has no post-candidate lesson-pack changes beyond the three structured review artifacts and their governance correction. Each cited artifact is schema-valid, approves the exact candidate, uses the required role, discloses github:VSBDev and a unique review run, and is canonically equivalent to its extant, non-dismissed COMMENTED GitHub review transport submitted by VSBDev against that commit. COMMENTED is eligible under the active founding-stage self-operated-agent rule. The eligible set supplies one academic, one learning-design, and one accessibility-and-rights approval across three unique runs and the three disclosed provider families Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI; the author run, those review runs, and this fresh adjudication run are all distinct. Provenance is internally consistent and attested, not independently verified. No major or blocking finding exists. The academic review's three minor findings are expressly resolved without candidate change: the two-to-four concept-block range is labelled as a lesson heuristic, the source-function synthesis is scoped and assigned medium-high confidence despite the textbook-row sourcing limitation, and interface claims are dated with change uncertainty. The remaining reviews report notes only, and no reviewer dissents. Collectively the record covers factual claims, source boundaries, assessment logic, instructional alignment, accessibility, rights, privacy, security, attribution, and provenance. Disclosed limitations remain: no real-learner effectiveness testing, native assistive-technology or disabled-learner usability session, live-interface behavior verification by the academic reviewer, unavailable non-web exporter testing, legal opinion, or external proof of run, provider, model, or digest identity. Source, terms, and agent-access observations are dated. These limitations do not leave a credible protocol blocker, but they support medium-high rather than high lesson-level source confidence. A merge decision therefore justifies only the conditioned governance transitions to published status, medium-high source confidence, and reviewed status for every retained claim; it does not itself merge or publish the pull request.
conditions: The neutral coordinator must submit this exact artifact as the structured GitHub adjudication transport on PR 15 against the frozen candidate and preserve canonical equivalence and an eligible non-dismissed COMMENTED state.

In the governance-only integration, set lesson.json status to published and sourceConfidence to medium-high, and set reviewStatus to reviewed for all five retained claims; change no other candidate or claims-ledger field.

Regenerate required public outputs and rerun full deterministic validation, lesson-PR readiness, and GitHub-provenance checks at the integration head; any substantive lesson change stales the review set and this decision.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev operating final adjudication agent (Codex, OpenAI)
